label: Media Archive
positive_tail: archival documentary still, careful restoration texture, tactile paper and film materials, grounded natural lighting
image_grade_tail: subtle archival patina, clean readable composition
announcer_visual_subject: archive presenter at a catalog table with labeled boxes and a restored microphone
music_visual_subject: archival audio equipment and labeled reels arranged for restoration
scene_open_subject: archive workroom with film cans, paper labels, and careful preservation tools
character_portrait_style: documentary portrait in an archive setting

motion_prompts.announcer: Continuous shot, same surface throughout. Slow steadicam push-in. Shallow rack focus drifts forward. Dust motes catch and cross the light. Gentle settling at the end.
motion_prompts.music_open: Continuous shot, same bench throughout. Slow dolly push as rotation begins and steadily accelerates. Threading motion draws the eye forward. Light warms across the frame.
motion_prompts.music_close: Continuous shot, same bench throughout. Rotation slows to a stop. Focus softens. Light dims gradually. Slow dolly pull back to rest.
motion_prompts.music_inter: Continuous shot, same shelf throughout. Slow lateral tracking drift. Focus hands off plane to plane. Subtle parallax carries the motion.
